Use the %1$s button to verify that the k: Use the %1$s button to verify that the key is accessible for search engines. Clicking on it should open the key file in your browser and show the API key.
The IndexNow API key proves the ownershi: The IndexNow API key proves the ownership of the site. It is generated automatically. You can change the key if it becomes known to third parties.
Submit posts from these post types autom: Submit posts from these post types automatically to the IndexNow API when a post is published, updated, or trashed.
The URLs don't belong to the host or the: The URLs don't belong to the host or the key is not matching the schema in the protocol.
The key was invalid (e.g. key not found,: The key was invalid (e.g. key not found, file found but key not in the file).
The URL was successfully submitted to th: The URL was successfully submitted to the IndexNow API, but the API key will be checked later.
The URL was successfully submitted to the IndexNow API.
